text.title: Substack vs Beehiiv vs ConvertKit vs Ghost Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when substack-beehiiv-pick is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Author picks Substack for ease, hits 5k subs, regrets brand lock-in.
antipattern.reason: Owned-audience priority was understated at decision time.
antipattern.note: Fix: Re-run rubric every 6 months; if priority shifted, plan migration before next email.

antipattern.description: Author migrates after 200 subs, loses 80 in transit.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r4: project ~10% loss; defer until that loss is small absolutely.
Fix: Apply r1: ≥3 weighted criteria in rationale.
